abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

abilities.name: Fortune Favors the Bold
abilities.text: After this model discards a friendly upgrade, it may move up to 2".

actions.name: Unleashed Curse
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, make a Remains marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Tomb Curse
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (aura)4" of the target.

triggers.name: Arc
triggers.text: Once per activation. Declare this action again targeting a different model, drawing range and LoS from the original target.

actions.name: Scrounge for Relics
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. This model may remove a Remains marker within 2" of the target. If it does so, this action receives a (fortitude).
actions.effects: Attach an Artifact upgrade to the target.

triggers.name: Quick Reflexes
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting a different model.

actions.name: Saddle Up
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Replace this model with Lucas McCabe, Relic Hunter. Then, this model heals 3.

triggers.name: Like the Wind
triggers.text: Move this model up to 5", ignoring enemy models.

triggers.name: "Forgot That Was There!"
triggers.text: Attach an Artifact upgrade to this model.
